name: Crystal Word Match
description: 3D crystal matching game. Students match word pairs, image-to-word pairs, or word-to-word pairs by clicking floating crystals in a space scene.

slots.label: Game data JSON with pairs array and sub_type (WordToWord or ImageToWord)

aiInstructions: Generate a JSON object with: sub_type ('WordToWord' for text-only matching, or provide pairs with item1/item2 objects). For WordToWord: { sub_type: 'WordToWord', pairs: [['cat', 'gato'], ['dog', 'perro']] }. For structured pairs: { pairs: [{ id: 1, item1: { value: 'cat' }, item2: { value: 'gato' } }] }. Create 4-8 pairs appropriate for the student's level.
